core_mechanism: Percolation-type emergence of a giant connected component in a random network, governed by a branching process whose component-size distribution and critical connectivity threshold are obtained exactly from probability-generating-function self-consistency equations
brief_reason: The abstract presents a solvable random-graph model yielding exact component sizes, the size and formation threshold of the giant component, and the percolation threshold, which is the signature of a generating-function branching-process analysis of a giant-component/percolation phase transition.
